name: Kidduca
developer: RMB Games - Free learning games fo Kids, RMB Games - Educational Academy
publisher: RMB Games - Free learning games fo Kids, RMB Games - Educational Academy
short_description: Awesome! The best educational game for kids to help them learn Letters, Numbers, Colors, Shapes in English, Spanish, Portuguese and French! Our games are highly appreciated by millions of Moms and Teachers around the world!
detailed_description:
Kidduca: Fun Learning for Kids Aged 2-5!

Explore the world of Kidduca — a vibrant educational game designed to entertain and teach children aged 2 to 5. With 90+ learning levels and 400+ objects, animals, and words in English, Spanish, Portuguese, and French, Kidduca turns early education into an unforgettable adventure.

Why Choose Kidduca?

Learn four languages while mastering the alphabet, numbers, shapes, colors, and more!

Professionally narrated levels by native speakers for perfect pronunciation!

Develop essential skills: memory, logic, fine motor skills, creativity, and musical rhythm!

Exciting Features for Kids:

Interactive tasks to learn and play;

Fun activities like sorting, grouping, and exploring shapes;

A journey through famous landmarks in San Francisco, Paris, and Moscow.

Adventure-Packed Zones!

Meet lovable characters like Fluffy Chick, Glamorous Kitty, and Cool Panda as you explore:

The Funny Pizza Factory;

The Candy Museum;

The Dino Museum;

Extreme Ski Races;

Musical Adventures;

Magic Beach and more.

Why Parents Love Kidduca?

Kidduca is developed with input from educators and psychologists to ensure every level is safe, engaging, and beneficial for children’s development. The difficulty adjusts as your child progresses, encouraging growth and confidence.

Download Now and Start Learning Through Play!

Join millions of families and discover why Kidduca is the perfect game for your little one!

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain*, Arabic, Bulgarian, Portuguese - Brazil*, Hungarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian*, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese, Indonesian
*languages with full audio support
